allow:
Bash(python -c "
import ast
tree = ast.parse\(open\('framework/agents/documentation_agent.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)
methods = [node.name for node in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(node, ast.FunctionDef\)]
required = ['_atomic_write', '_create_backup', '_cleanup_backups', '_validate_content', '_apply_section_patches', '_try_merge_patches']
for m in required:
    assert m in methods, f'Missing method: {m}'
    print\(f'  ✓ {m}'\)
print\('All required methods verified.'\)
")
